title: WA CFS Quarterly Trend Sheet- Q4 2024: Deficits Rose by 13.89% in Q4 2024
content:
Key Takeaways:

In Q4 2024, total creditsâ€”excluding those generated from electricityâ€”declined by 26.45% quarter-over-quarter, reaching 415,923 due to a fall in credits from renewable diesel. Meanwhile, electricity credits rose by 8.06%, totaling 273,391. On the other hand, deficits increased by 13.89% QoQ, amounting to 287,468.
author: Mansift Kaur
